ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "team_abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the team */,
  "team_city" TEXT /* City where the team is located */,
  "team_state" TEXT /* State where the team is located */,
  "team_logo" TEXT /* Logo of the team */,
  "team_colors" TEXT /* Colors of the team */,
  "team_stadium" TEXT /* Stadium where the team plays */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "player_position" TEXT /* Position of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Team ID of the player */,
  "player_height" TEXT /* Height of the player */,
  "player_weight" TEXT /* Weight of the player */,
  "player_draft_info" TEXT /* Draft information of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_year" INTEGER /* Year of the season */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season */,
  "season_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "season_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)
column_names: City where the team is located
State where the team is located
